post.description: Adds a message to an existing conversation
Closes a conversation, creating a closed conversation message by the user

get.summary: Get all actor numbers that have a conversation.
get.description: Returns a distinct list of actor numbers for actors that participate in at least one conversation.

get.summary:
Get all conversations or just conversations for a MeteringPoint, provided that query parameter 'meteringpointidentification' is supplied.
The result can be further narrowed by either searching or filtering or both.
- Search
  - Supports searching for a MeteringPoint and searching into DisplayId and InternalNote for the logged in actor.
  - The search for the MeteringPoint is an exact search based on the 18 digits GSRN.
  - The search value is supplied as querystring 'searchValue'.
- Filtering
  - The list can further be narrowed down via filters.
  - Provides with supports for filtering myConversations, unread, opened, closed and subjects.
  - Filters are supplied as querystring, ex. myconversations=true to get my conversations only.
get.description: Get all conversations across all meteringpoints or for a single MeteringPoint, provided that query parameter 'meteringpointidentification' is supplied

parameters.name: meteringPointIdentification
parameters.description: GSRN consists of 18 digits supplied as querystring by name 'meteringPointIdentification'. Null to retrieve across all meteringpoints or search for a meteringpoint.

parameters.name: searchValue
parameters.description: Search string supplied as querystring by name 'searchValue' to be searched for into DisplayId and InternalNote for the logged in actor.

parameters.name: myConversations
parameters.description: Filter for only my conversations, thus participated either as sender, replied a message, closed the conversation. Passed as querystring of same name, ex. myConversations=true .

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description: Filter for only unread conversations. Passed as querystring of same name, ex. unread=true.

parameters.name: opened
parameters.description: Filter for only opened or active conversations. Passed as querystring of same name, ex. opened=true.

parameters.name: closed
parameters.description: Filter for only closed conversations. Passed as querystring of same name, ex. closed=true.

parameters.name: subjects
parameters.description: Filter for only listed Conversationsubjects. passed as querystring of same name. ex subject=QuestionForEnerginet&subjects=ElectricalHeating

get.summary: Gets information regarding electrical heating on a measuring point
get.description: Gets information regarding electrical heating on a measuring point

post.description: Marks a conversation as read by the invoking actor
Marks a conversation as unread by the invoking actor

Example request for QuestionForEnerginet:

```
   {
      "subject": "QuestionForEnerginet",
      "senderActorType": "Energinet",
      "receiverActorType": "GridAccessProvider",
      "meteringPointIdentification": "570715000000033841",
      "senderActorNumber": "5790001330552",
      "senderUserId": "user@elsupplier.dk",
      "senderUserName": "EL supplier"
      "internalNote": "Note from the sender",
      "content": "No metereddata available!!!",
      "anonymous": false
    }
 ```

post.summary: Starts a new conversation regarding electrical heating price reduction.
post.description: Starts a new conversation regarding electrical heating price reduction.

get.description: Updates an internal note for the invoking participant of a conversation

post.description: Updates an internal note for the invoking participant of a conversation

content.description:
The message content, thus the body itself.
Can contain at most 5000 characters and should not be empty.

anonymous.description: Specifies whether the message is anonymous with respect to the Sender information.

attachedDocumentIds.description: The documents that should be attached to this message

actorIdentifiers.description: Actor identifiers with at least one conversation.

closed.description: true for conversations that are closed. false otherwise.

partOfConversations.description:
Indicates id you are part of this conversation.
Energinet can see conversations they are not part of.

read.description: Specifies whether the conversation has been read or not

lastUpdated.description: Last updated time of the conversation

meteringPointIdentification.description:
MeteringPointIdentification
18 digits GSRN number consisting of digits only.

internalNote.description:
Optional Internal note from the Organization, that created the Conversation.
Can contain at most 80 characters and will be assumed empty, if not specified

content.description:
The message content, thus the body itself.
Can contain at most 5000 characters and should not be empty.

anonymous.description: Specifies whether the message is anonymous with respect to the Sender information.

attachedDocumentIds.description: The documents that should be attached to the message that starts the conversation

internalNote.description:
Optional Internal note from the active participant
Can contain at most 80 characters and will be assumed empty, if not specified
